# Feature: [Name]

## Goal
What you are trying to achieve. Include key deliverables as a bullet list.

---

## Scope

### In Scope
- What this feature covers

### Out of Scope
- What is explicitly deferred or excluded

---

## Functional Requirements
- What the system must do (user/business-facing behavior)

---

## Behavioral Requirements
- How the system must behave (runtime, operational, non-functional constraints)

---

## Technical Constraints
- Technology, version, or pattern restrictions that must be respected

---


## Architecture Overview

### High Level
Describe the overall system design and how components interact at a conceptual level.

### Low Level
Describe the specific implementation details: classes, methods, config blocks, data flow, and any non-obvious design decisions.

---

## Open Questions / Areas to Research
> **Planning mode.** These must be resolved before or during early implementation. Use this section to capture unknowns, decisions pending input, and areas that need investigation before the approach is locked in.

- [ ] Open question or research area 1

---

## Testing Approach
Describe the overall testing strategy at a high level. Cover: what is tested, how (e.g. testcontainers, unit, manual), what is excluded from CI and why, and any environment-specific considerations.

---

## Steps to take for final approach
Ordered list of concrete actions remaining after the current implementation phase.

1. Step 1

---

## Acceptance Criteria

### [Category 1]
- [ ] Criterion

### [Category 2]
- [ ] Criterion

---

## Affected Files/Dirs

| File/Dir | Status | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `path/to/file` | 🔲 Pending / ✅ Done | What this file does in the context of the feature |

---

## Additional Resources
- Web: <url>
- Document: <relative_or_absolute_path_to_doc>
- Code: <relative_or_absolute_path_to_code_file>
- Directory: <relative_or_absolute_path_to_dir>

---

## Outstanding Items

> **Implementation mode.** Populate this section with any discovered outstanding items. Informational items go in the "Key Discoveries & Pitfalls" section below, while actionable items that need to be resolved before completion go here.

### Need to Fix / Major Blockers
- Items that must be resolved before this feature can be considered complete or safe to merge/deploy.

### Should Fix / Minor Blockers
- Items that are not hard blockers but should be addressed soon. Technical debt, edge cases, known fragility.

### Can Fix
- Nice-to-haves, cleanups, and low-priority improvements that can be deferred.

---

## Key Discoveries & Pitfalls
> **Implementation mode.** Capture any important discoveries, gotchas, or pitfalls encountered during implementation that future maintainers should be aware of. Be sure to include debugging steps here.

### [Discovery Title]
- What was discovered
- Why it matters
- Fix or workaround applied
